description_long: This is a large, modern residential house set within a spacious, landscaped lot surrounded by a perimeter wall. The house features a combination of flat and low-pitched roofs, with multiple wings and a central main structure. The property includes a driveway leading to a covered carport, a swimming pool with a poolside lounge area, and several garden spaces with mature trees and flower beds. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with large windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, and a prominent main entryway with columns and a covered porch. The backyard offers open green space, while the front is more structured with paved paths and decorative landscaping. The overall design emphasizes openness, luxury, and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A spacious, modern house with flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a covered carport, all enclosed by a perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, driveway, carport, and landscaped gardens with trees and flower beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, poolside lounge, and the rear garden with additional trees and open green space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, open lawn, and the back facade with large windows and minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garden beds, secondary entry points, and the overall depth of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in rows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered entry with columns, wide steps, and a sheltered porch
